heading: Exemption
label: 5723 Exemption
text: Chapter 10 of title 5 shall not apply to the Panel or to an advisory committee established under .section 5722 of this title
notes: Amendments2022— substituted “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “The Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)”.Pub. L. 117–286
amendments: Amendments2022— substituted “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “The Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)”.Pub. L. 117–286
